description:
Create an inverted finding chart from a specific region of the Messier 12 globular cluster. 

Instructions:
1. Open the raw FITS image located at `~/AstroImages/raw/m12/Vcomb.fits` in AstroImageJ.
2. Visually locate the dense central core of the globular cluster.
3. Create a rectangular spatial selection (ROI) of exactly 500x500 pixels centered roughly on the cluster core.
4. Crop the image to this exact selection (Edit > Crop).
5. Save the cropped scientific data as a FITS file to `~/AstroImages/processed/m12_core_crop.fits`.
6. Adjust the image display properties for a printed finding chart:
   - Invert the image's Lookup Table (LUT) so the background sky becomes white and the stars become black.
   - Adjust the brightness/contrast if necessary so the stars are clearly defined against the white background.
7. Save the resulting visual display as a PNG image to `~/AstroImages/processed/m12_core_finding_chart.png`.
